frontier.use_cases: Complex architectural planning, ambiguous bug diagnosis, multi-file refactors, maximum-effort security/quality review, pre-release gates.

standard.use_cases: Standard feature implementation, bug fixes, refactors, TDD cycles, medium/high-effort code review.

economy.use_cases: Secret scanning, dependency auditing, formatting, changelog generation, docs updates, pre-flight/PR-formatting (SHIP mode), low-effort review.
